name: ai-desktop-pet
description: Windows Live2D AI desktop pet with a local-first companion experience.
author: AI Desktop Pet Project

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.main.json && node scripts/build-bundled-baidu-mcp-server.mjs && tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json && vite build
scripts.package:win:dir: npm run build && electron-builder --win dir --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.package:win:portable: npm run build && electron-builder --win portable --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.package:win:nsis: npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis --config electron-builder.config.cjs --publish never
